title: 2025-2026 FALL SEMESTER APPLICATION RESULTS
content:
Dear Students,

To learn the application results, please visit:

https://app.uskudar.edu.tr/form/enstitu/fbe_kesin_kayit.

Those eligible to be placed on the main list must submit their applications between August 1st and August 18th, 2025.

Those eligible to be placed on the reserve list must submit their applications between August 19th and August 29th, 2025, depending on the registration status of students on the main list, including quotas.

Applicants wishing to apply for room R19 on the 3rd floor of Çarşı Campus between the specified dates must fill out the registration form at our office and go to the Student Affairs Office to complete the final registration process.

Note: Reserve list information will be provided by phone.
